title: pelargonium luridum
intro: Pelargonium luridum, also known as Red Form of Luridum, is a species of flowering plant in the geranium family that is native to South Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Pelargonium luridum include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
